title: SSA Reasoner – Garden/Animal Schedule Tradeoffs Delta
description: Delta-style schema for proposed schedule tradeoffs for garden and animal sessions/steps. Used by the Reasoner to suggest rescheduling, batching, or skipping tasks based on weather, daylight, Sabbath, quiet hours, animal welfare, and household workload.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version for this payload shape.

domains.description: Domains this delta applies to. Typically a subset of ['garden', 'animals'].

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tradeoff delta was generated.

requestId.description: Optional ID that ties this delta back to a Reasoner request.

householdId.description: Optional household/profile identifier this tradeoff set is scoped to.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale in which labels and notes are expressed, e.g. 'en-US'.

tradeoffs.description: List of individual schedule tradeoff proposals to add/update/remove in the planning knowledge base.

id.description: Stable identifier for this tradeoff rule or recommendation. May reference an existing rule for updates.

status.description: Whether this tradeoff is newly proposed, already accepted, or deprecated.

operation.description: How this delta should be applied.

sessionId.description: Optional reference to a specific session this tradeoff targets.

stepId.description: Optional reference to a specific step within the session that is most impacted.

task.description: High-level description of the garden/animal task being traded off.

title.description: Human-facing name of the task, e.g. 'Evening milking' or 'Plant tomato seedlings'.

category.description: Task category for grouping and UI filters.

currentSchedule.description: The current scheduled window or typical time for this task.

slotLabel.description: Human-friendly label such as 'early morning', 'midday', 'evening', 'after sunset'.

alternativeSlots.description: Alternative time windows the Reasoner believes may be better given current constraints.

score.description: Relative desirability score (0–1) for this alternative slot.

notes.description: Notes explaining why this slot is recommended (e.g. 'cooler temperatures, less animal stress').

drivers.description: Key factors driving this tradeoff recommendation, normalized to 0–1 where possible.

weatherRisk.description: 0–1 risk score for adverse weather during the current schedule (1 = high risk).

daylightUtilization.description: 0–1 score indicating how well the schedule uses daylight (1 = optimal).

animalStressRisk.description: 0–1 risk score for animal stress (1 = high stress).

yieldImpact.description: Estimated impact on yield from following the current schedule vs. the recommended alternative. Negative values mean potential loss, positive values mean potential gain. Range is -1.0 (severe loss) to 1.0 (significant gain).

laborSpike.description: 0–1 measure of how much the current schedule contributes to a short-term labor spike (1 = very spiky).

sabbathConflict.description: True if the current schedule overlaps with Sabbath in a way that should be avoided, except for essential care.

quietHoursConflict.description: True if the current schedule likely conflicts with household quiet hours (e.g. noisy equipment at night).

recommendedAction.description: Primary recommended scheduling decision for this task.

batchingHints.description: Hints for batching this task with others to reduce labor spikes or make better use of weather/daylight.

canBatch.description: True if this task is safe/reasonable to batch with others.

batchWithTaskIds.description: Optional list of other tradeoff/task ids that are good candidates for batching.

notes.description: User-facing explanation of the tradeoff and its implications, suitable for display in the SessionRunner or scheduling UI.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tradeoff record was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tradeoff record was last updated.

guardResult.description: Result of a single guard evaluation (e.g. Sabbath, weather, inventory, quiet hours, battery).

ok.description: True if this guard passed, false if it failed or is blocking.

severity.description: Severity level for a non-ok guard.

suggestedAction.description: Suggested next step if this guard is not ok.

guardSummary.description: Aggregate summary of multiple guard results for a given session/step.

okToStart.description: True only if all blocking guards passed.

hasWarnings.description: True if one or more guards emitted warnings.

blockingGuards.description: List of guardIds that are currently blocking.

warningGuards.description: List of guardIds that are warning-only.

results.description: Per-guard results used to compute this summary.
